caption: A man stands behind a podium in a room with wood-paneled walls, speaking to an audience seated in rows. He wears a white shirt, a dark vest, and a red and black accessory around his neck. To his right, another man stands behind a separate microphone, gesturing with his hand while speaking. The audience consists of several people, including a woman in a blue and red patterned shawl and another in a yellow top, all facing toward the speakers. A small red maple leaf logo is visible on the podium. The text "ORCA" appears in a white box on the right side of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the camera zooms in on the man in the vest, who continues to speak into the microphone, while the other speaker and the audience remain in the frame.
